strategy: Four enemies with interlocking cheats (Bison plus Felicity, McCoil, and Rooster). Hit Storm - Bison resists 80% Myth and takes boosted Storm damage.
Do not attack Bison directly if you can help it: he retaliates for 20% of your max health each time. Route damage through the minions or use his own expel chain.

Use the expel chain as your kill order. Dropping Kenny Rooster below ~20% makes Felicity expel him; dropping Felicity below ~20% makes McCoil expel her; dropping McCoil below ~20% makes Rooster expel him. You can thin the field without fully killing everyone.
Avoid the punished tools while the minions live: blades on other wizards get Disarmed by Felicity, traps get Cleanse-Warded off, and any aura makes Kenny natural-attack for 300 Fire and destroy it.

Expect confusions from Bison on round 1 and periodically. Pack stun/confusion tolerance, whittle the minions to trigger their expels, then finish Bison with one Storm hit rather than trading natural attacks.
cheatNotes: A wizard who joins after round 1 gets confused by Bison for two rounds.
On round 1 and periodically after, Bison confuses every wizard for two rounds.
If Bison is attacked, he retaliates with his natural attack for 20% of the attacker's max health.
Blading another wizard makes Felicity Disarm the recipient, stripping the blade.
Casting any trap makes Felicity Cleanse Ward it off the target.
When Kenny Rooster drops below ~20% health, Felicity expels him from the duel.
McCoil interrupt-casts a Death spell handing every wizard a Free Sample or Snake Oil card.
When Felicity drops below ~20% health, McCoil expels her from the duel.
Casting any aura makes Kenny natural-attack for 300 Fire and destroy the aura.
When McCoil drops below ~20% health, Kenny expels him from the duel.
